title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Announcements

Internship Program Kick-off for Department of Architecture!

06
						July

2020

For our Prospective Architects who would graduate at the end of this term, an internship program which shall be executed by your faculty members is about to kick-off.

To apply to the Internship Program fill the form in this link.

All details as well as start dates for your particular internship shall be announced after all the applications are collected. You will also be informed via e-mail.

Deadline for application: July 10th, 2020, Friday

Click for detail info.
